name: Jenna Kruse, EMILY's List
subject: [Constitutional Convention] The GOP is already PRACTICING
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6235/24c69fd9/8919314a/189d2247/3318758452/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFEJ18N_digital_email_20171011_CCPractice_inact&source=WQEFEJ18N_digital_email_20171011_CCPractice_inact")
---

Peter,

Practice makes perfect.

That's why Republicans have been holding mock constitutional conventions. They want to make sure they know exactly how changing our Constitution behind closed doors would work.

Last year, they held one in Colonial Williamsburg, VA. There was another planning meeting in Phoenix, AZ, recently. Every day, Republicans are gathering more support for a convention that could put all of the rights the Constitution protects on the line.

We can't let them get that far. Republicans need 34 state legislatures to agree to call a constitutional convention, and right now they hold 32. But not for long.

**[Donate $3 to help elect more EMILY's List women to state legislatures across the country and prevent the GOP from holding a constitutional convention.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6235/24c69fd9/8919314a/189d2240/3318758452/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20171010_email_ConstitutionalConventionStates?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+to+help+elect+more+EMILYs+List+&utm_campaign=WQEFEJ18N_digital_email_20171011_CCPractice_inact&source=WQEFEJ18N_digital_email_20171011_CCPractice_inact")**

For many, this reality might seem like a remote possibility.

But the truth is, if we don't mobilize **now** for all of the state house and state senate races this year, next year, and beyond, an opportunity for Republicans to convene and amend the Constitution as we know it could be a lot closer than it seems. They're already practicing!

**Donate $3 to help recruit and train pro-choice Democratic women to replace Republicans and flip state legislatures from red to blue:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Flip-The-State-Legislatures](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6235/24c69fd9/8919314a/189d2241/3318758452/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20171010_email_ConstitutionalConventionStates?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgFlipTheStateLegi&utm_campaign=WQEFEJ18N_digital_email_20171011_CCPractice_inact&source=WQEFEJ18N_digital_email_20171011_CCPractice_inact")**

Thanks,

Jenna Kruse
Vice President of Research, EMILY's List

name: The White House
subject: America’s Tax System is Ready for Repairs
body:
Your 1600 Daily:
| | [](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=2364dfca1c253630ee7aaa88291acb840d13bdfed70c5085b8c8e5ac9bb62d3df1e21a823227df376c6f597e36cb9681022e6f7827f5cec5) The current tax code is a burden on American taxpayers and harmful to American job-creators. It has grown out of control in length and complexity so that many Americans must rely on professional help to file even the simplest return. Our outdated tax code also makes our businesses uncompetitive as other nations provide lower tax rates, and incentivizes American businesses to move their headquarters or offshore jobs. President Donald J. Trump is working to reform our tax system so that Americans are treated fairly, can keep more of their hard-earned money, and companies can bring jobs back to the United States. \------------- **Tax Relief Puts American Businesses First**
Last night, President Trump traveled to Harrisburg, Pennsylvania, to deliver remarks on tax reform. Joined by truckers, small business owners, manufacturers, and local leaders, the President stated,_“The biggest winners from this transformation will be everyday families, from all backgrounds, from all walks of life, and our great companies, which will produce the jobs.”_ _“As the central link in our nation’s supply chain, and the top employer in 29 states, the trucking industry knows tax reform will create tens of thousands of middle-income jobs for drivers, mechanics, technicians, warehouse workers, and more,”_ said American Trucking Associations President Chris Spear in a tweet posted by @TRUCKINGdotORG. Why do Americans and American businesses need tax reform? [Explore the facts](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=2364dfca1c25363060399362e708d8e844d242cd2cdc4ca9ec31c4d6e78705cd605c681e75dcf8a555a4e7e15a72c738e3b4bcb513539217) and learn more about the President’s Unified Framework at[ whitehouse.gov/taxreform.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=2364dfca1c2536300c4ec90432d75083d843d42075393d6aff628a3a665e0f3e044b489b3c7247d69f529435c1142aa79a59f512af8b27fd)**Canadian Prime Minister Justin Trudeau Visits White House**
President Trump and First Lady Melania Trump greeted Prime Minister Justin Trudeau of Canada and Mrs. Grégoire Trudeau on the South Portico of the White House yesterday. Later in the Oval Office, the President and Prime Minister spoke on the special relationship that the United States and Canada share, as well as on the future of North American Free Trade Agreement (NAFTA). [ See More. ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=2364dfca1c2536309f00bd60d652691d3daed0d8ae9ee8aa3e3340c5cb150953f55f021f1c85ce80a1a6da33b8508151a34d37f4cc2f9f6b)**Celebrating International Day of the Girl**
Yesterday, in honor of International Day of the Girl, the Trump Administration reaffirmed its commitment to promoting the empowerment of more than one billion young girls growing up around the world. _“Ensuring young women have the access, education, and training they need to reach their full potential is critical to ensuring that the power, intellect, and skill of our best and brightest young women is unleashed for the betterment of all,”_ President Trump stated. The Trump Administration has launched several efforts in the science, technology, engineering, and math (STEM) fields, expanded access to vocational training and apprenticeships that will benefit women and girls, and worked in communities around the world to help girls understand their rights, increase their self-confidence, and motivate them to pursue leadership roles in their communities. Read the President’s full statement on International Day of the Girl [here.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=1d2b59552e46a723277e06c39883182fad594e40d5f712a6650956f2e6b6fb34c98de5681f14a29508cad907b9ff46a41bcc975df0c7f95c)
# Photo of the Day
**First Lady Melania Trump and Mrs. Sophie Grégoire Trudeau of Canada** | October 11, 2017 (Official White House Photo by Andrea Hanks)
# POTUS AND VP TODAY
Today, President Trump will sign an Executive Order to promote healthcare choice and competition. Later in the afternoon, the President and Friday Lady will participate in the announcement of the Secretary of Homeland Security nominee. The Vice President will join the President for both events.
# COMING UP
Tomorrow, the President will deliver remarks to the 2017 Voters Values Summit in Washington, D.C. The Vice President will be in New York talking tax reform.
---

[Privacy Policy](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=1d2b59552e46a72351f59c525d36cef7f773e18ed94356c8023f3e385aaaa029fd35eb9c89ae532e3075b9b18f1fa26d59c79ad744025579) | [Contact the White House](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=1d2b59552e46a723009829f5811ce93b29e3e0377632e081c87020cfb6a1ff800d79c9f4398e6429397e10c4ad2e12318cffe33fd2698af6) | [Unsubscribe](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d4b72d7e82fc9f438cb183d7909a6c3e5a35c20ba567152dea6edfb441347695a65dbdcc993fcc8294755b1cc12f46834d)
---

name: Gov. Mike Huckabee, My Faith Votes
subject: My commitment to you
body:
| | Will you stand with me in this fight?
---
[ ](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=171012_ea_s1&n=1) To unsubscribe from Intersect, [click here](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=171012_ea_s1&n=2).
| Dear Peter, I’m proud to join My Faith Votes as the new Honorary National Chairman. My goal is simple: to see every single Christian in America show up during every single election to make their voices heard! And this coming November, I’m committed to help in every way I can to elect leaders who will stand for biblical principles in the public square! **The fight to protect our Christian values is not over. We must not grow complacent. Now is the time to act...** [Give now and help mobilize Christians to put their faith into action at the ballot box this November.](https://www3-myfaithvotes.nationbuilder.com/act_on_your_faith_this_november?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=171012_ea_s1&n=3) I’ve never been more convinced of this: Christians will determine every election in America if they just show up. We’ve reached a tipping point in America’s history, and we’ll either emerge from it stronger and better than ever before, or we’ll slide into an irreversible decline. It’s time for people of faith to step up to the plate and lead our nation! **And our chance is fast approaching with 588 elections on November 7 alone.** New governors, mayors, school boards, and more will soon be in charge of making laws and enacting new policies. Peter, ask yourself, _"Do I want leaders at all levels of government who will stand for Christian values?"_ If you answered _yes_ ... [Please give a gift today and help reach millions more Christians to vote their faith at the polls this November.](https://www3-myfaithvotes.nationbuilder.com/act_on_your_faith_this_november?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=171012_ea_s1&n=4) Thank you for putting your faith into action through your generous support and prayers! Sincerely,

Gov. Mike Huckabee
Honorary National Chairman
My Faith Votes | | [Mobilize Christians to vote ►](https://www3-myfaithvotes.nationbuilder.com/act_on_your_faith_this_november?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=171012_ea_s1&n=5)

name: Tom Perez
subject: BREAKING: New executive order sabotages the ACA
body:
We need to hold Republicans accountable for this.
---
**Trump's latest executive order guts Obamacare. Pitch in $3 or more to show Republicans you're ready to kick them out of office.

** **[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523b6a/4067b0a/3bf5e5b7a/7e651515/2502081437/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20171012_tp_nd&source=em_20171012_tp_nd&refcode=em_20171012_tp_nd")**

I've had it, Derek.

The Trump administration just announced its latest attempt to sabotage our health care system -- a new executive order allowing businesses to purchase bare-bones insurance plans that undermine protections put in place by the Affordable Care Act.

Millions of Americans from every state have rallied, signed petitions, and made phone calls to share their stories and let Republicans know how helpful access to affordable care has been to them and their families.

But Republicans keep ignoring us. And after repeated failures to repeal our health care, the GOP has decided to forego our checks and balances in favor of Trump's recklessness.

This White House has purposely cut funding for advertising efforts to promote Obamacare's next open enrollment period. They've attacked women's rights by rolling back the ACA mandate that requires employers to cover birth control.

Now, they're working to undermine our health care system by creating markets that only healthy people can afford -- leaving millions of Americans with pre-existing conditions out in the cold.

Trump considers undoing anything with President Obama's name on it a win -- but health care is not a game. It's a right for every American.

Let's show this White House and Republicans in Congress what happens when they decide to ignore the majority of Americans and gut Obamacare.

body:
Friend,

We don't need to remind you, but the left loves high taxes.

Why? It's their way of asserting control over everyday Americans.

**Instead of trusting you to do what 's best with your money, the left takes it upon themselves to determine that for you. **

So for the past 30 years, you've seen your take-home pay dwindle while your tax rates sky-rocket -- all thanks to unfair and unnecessary taxes imposed by the left.

As conservatives, we don't believe in high taxes. Instead, we believe in individual prosperity that starts with letting you keep more of your paycheck. **That 's why your House Republicans are lowering your taxes.**

But we know the left will not willingly give up their big government and high taxes, so we need you to stand with us today.

name: Russ Feingold, LegitPAC
subject: The most important election this year
body:
[ Legit ]LegitPAC

Friend,

Virginia has one of the most hyperpartisan gerrymanders in the country
-- and some of the most-watched elections nationwide this November.

The races of Ralph Northam for governor, Justin Fairfax for lieutenant
governor, and Mark Herring for attorney general could have
consequences for democratic legitimacy not just in Virginia, but
throughout America.

All three races are winnable, but well funded opponents who will
undermine democratic legitimacy are fighting hard.

With election day coming up in less than a month, these three strong
candidates need our help now.

[ https://act.legitaction.com/go/1418?t=1002&akid=331%2E356062%2EyMhD9_ ]Contribute $3 to support three great candidates
in Virginia: Ralph Northam for governor, Justin Fairfax for lieutenant
governor, and Mark Herring for attorney general.

Ralph Northam is running for governor. As a state senator, he
co-sponsored bills to create a bipartisan redistricting commission
that would not only make state elections more fair -- but would also
likely change which representatives Virginia sends to the U.S. House.
As lieutenant governor, he supported efforts to restore voting rights
to ex-felons who have paid their debt to society.

Justin Fairfax is clear: “As lieutenant governor, I want to fight for
nonpartisan redistricting; it might be one of the most important
issues of our time.” And he’s absolutely right: nonpartisan
redistricting is a huge step forward for democratic legitimacy.
Fairfax has also been a strong opponent of unlimited money in
politics.

Mark Herring is running for reelection as attorney general, where he
successfully defended the governor’s order to restore voting rights to
200,000 ex-felons. A strong progressive, he will continue to use his
position of power to directly help create a more legitimate
government.

Under the leadership of these three progressives, more Virginians will
have the ability to participate meaningfully in elections -- and the
results will make an impact on a national level.

[ https://act.legitaction.com/go/1418?t=1003&akid=331%2E356062%2EyMhD9_ ]Contribute $3 to support Ralph Northam for
governor, Justin Fairfax for lieutenant governor, and Mark Herring for
attorney general.

This is it. With less than a month to go, time is running out to make
the biggest impact possible on these important races that will
determine the future of Virginia democracy.

Thank you for standing up for our democratic legitimacy today,

Russ Feingold

[ https://act.legitaction.com/go/1418?t=1004&akid=331%2E356062%2EyMhD9_ ]CONTRIBUTE »

Kaine for Virginia

BREAKING: President Trump signs executive order to sabotage Affordable Care Act

After repeatedly failing to repeal the ACA in Congress, President Trump is now using an executive order to try to destabilize our health care system. Today's order would allow cheap low-quality plans onto the market that could discriminate against people with preexisting conditions, seniors, and women. And it aims to push healthy people onto junk plans, leaving only the sick or at-risk on ACA plans -- essentially destroying the insurance market. The result could be higher premiums for families and more discrimination by big insurance companies.

subject: Rigging the system

body:
Republicans in the legislature found a new way to rig the system. Last week, they called themselves into a special session and passed a bill that eliminates all primary elections for judicial races next year.
|
[](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/12033b6/2fde7c66/447dca30/1569b0ac/2154797421/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIiwiSlNWYVNWQWxKUT09IjoiMjg0NTciLCJKU1ZNUVZOVVRrRk5SU1VsIjoiIn0=/ "http://act.roycooper.com/page/s/-add-your-name-tell-republicans-stop-rigging-the-system-?&firstname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=28457&lastname=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em17_171010_judges_adv_gq_ful__RC&source=em17_171010_judges_adv_gq_ful__RC")
---

Republicans in the legislature found a new way to rig the system, Friend.

Last week, they called themselves into a special session and passed a bill that eliminates all primary elections for judicial races next year.

It's a prelude to a constitutional amendment that will have the legislature selecting judges. We can't let that happen.

Apparently, they are so tired of judges ruling their laws unconstitutional, they're taking matters into their own hands to rig the system in their favor and take control of the state courts.

**[I vetoed this bill because Republicans in the legislature need to stop rigging the system in their favor. Add your name to let them know you agree.](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/12033b6/2fde7c66/447dca30/1569b0af/2154797421/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIiwiSlNWYVNWQWxKUT09IjoiMjg0NTciLCJKU1ZNUVZOVVRrRk5SU1VsIjoiIn0=/ "http://act.roycooper.com/page/s/-add-your-name-tell-republicans-stop-rigging-the-system-?&firstname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=28457&lastname=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&utm_content=2+-+I+vetoed+this+bill+because+Republicans+i&utm_campaign=em17_171010_judges_adv_gq_ful__RC&source=em17_171010_judges_adv_gq_ful__RC")**

This is simple, Friend.

If the legislature doesn't like judges ruling many of their laws unconstitutional, they should stop writing unconstitutional laws -- not rig the system to try to change the judges.

**[I vetoed this bill and I need you with me on this one. Add your name.](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/12033b6/2fde7c66/447dca30/1569b0ae/2154797421/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIiwiSlNWYVNWQWxKUT09IjoiMjg0NTciLCJKU1ZNUVZOVVRrRk5SU1VsIjoiIn0=/ "http://act.roycooper.com/page/s/-add-your-name-tell-republicans-stop-rigging-the-system-?&firstname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=28457&lastname=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&utm_content=3+-+I+vetoed+this+bill+and+I+need+you+with+m&utm_campaign=em17_171010_judges_adv_gq_ful__RC&source=em17_171010_judges_adv_gq_ful__RC")**

Thanks for all you continue to do,

Roy | | [**Add your name ->**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/12033b6/2fde7c66/447dca30/1569b0a1/2154797421/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIiwiSlNWYVNWQWxKUT09IjoiMjg0NTciLCJKU1ZNUVZOVVRrRk5SU1VsIjoiIn0=/ "http://act.roycooper.com/page/s/-add-your-name-tell-republicans-stop-rigging-the-system-?&firstname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=28457&lastname=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&utm_content=4+-+Add+your+name+rarr&utm_campaign=em17_171010_judges_adv_gq_ful__RC&source=em17_171010_judges_adv_gq_ful__RC")

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: Billionaires-First Republican Tax Plan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
| __
Last week, Speaker Ryan traveled to Maryland to speak with factory workers about the Republican budget and tax reform plan. I am always glad when my congressional colleagues visit Maryland, but I was disappointed that Speaker Ryan used the occasion to engage in a lot of flimflam and misinformation about the GOP tax plan.

Contrary to what Ryan told Marylanders, the Republican plan will NOT help the middle class and will NOT spur economic growth. It's a billionaires-first, trickle-down tax scheme that hands out massive tax cuts to the rich at the expense of working Americans.

And that's only the beginning. It will result in a huge increase in the national debt and massive cuts to Medicare, Medicaid, education, and transportation. It increases taxes on millions of working families by eliminating the state and local tax deduction--claimed by nearly half of all Maryland taxpayers in 2014.

[**Please help us get the word out that this plan must be stopped. We need to respond like we did to Trumpcare and ensure the public knows the truth about this billionaires-first Republican tax plan.**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91ba5/70cdc2ba/46af16da/397d833/2147677389/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/republicantaxreform?refcode=em101217&amount=25.00&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Please+help+us+get+the+word+out+that+thi&utm_campaign=em101217&source=em101217")

I've asked my Republican colleagues to work on a bipartisan basis to craft a budget and simplify our tax code, but so far they haven't been willing to work across the aisle. Instead, they've followed the same pattern they did with Trumpcare -- 'their way or the highway'.

The sad truth is that, despite all their rhetoric about helping working people, Republicans in Washington are more concerned with rewarding their wealthy campaign donors than actually improving the tax code for all Americans.

[**With your help we must counter the Republican misinformation campaign on tax reform and block this outrageous plan >>**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91ba5/70cdc2ba/46af16da/397d830/2147677389/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/republicantaxreform?refcode=em101217&amount=25.00&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+With+your+help+we+must+counter+the+Repub&utm_campaign=em101217&source=em101217")

This is an issue that impacts millions of Americans directly and every family and business in our state.

Together we need to stop this train-wreck.

Thank you for all you do,

Chris Van Hollen
U.S. Senator

---

---

subject: NYT: "Trump Signs Order to Undermine Obamacare"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Trump just signed an executive order designed to sabotage Obamacare. Add your name now to protect health care >>
---
**[](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954de80/2b07114c/ed4901f4/731577ba/2815339980/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVkdTVkpUVkU1QlRVVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/ "http://action.dscc.org/page/s/stop-gop-attacks-on-obamacare?source=PT-20171012-Signature_DS-ProsHV&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=")**
_**New York Times: "Foiled in Congress, Trump Signs Order to Undermine Obamacare"**_
Team --

Earlier today, Trump signed an executive order designed to sabotage our country's health care system.

While the White House claims this will offer more cost-effective health care, don't be fooled. The executive order opens the door to junk insurance plans that provide fewer benefits and fewer protections for the people who need them most.

Now that Senate Democrats have thwarted his plans to repeal Obamacare -- TWICE -- Trump is trying to bypass Congress and destroy Obamacare anyway. We have to show we'll never back down from this fight, no matter how Trump tries to force through his anti-Obamacare agenda.

[**Add your name right now to say you oppose Trump 's executive order sabotaging Obamacare.**](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954de80/2b07114c/ed4901f4/731577ba/2815339980/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVkdTVkpUVkU1QlRVVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/ "http://action.dscc.org/page/s/stop-gop-attacks-on-obamacare?source=PT-20171012-Signature_DS-ProsHV&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=")

Under Trump's executive order, certain insurance plans would no longer be required to cover basic benefits, like prescription drugs. They could also deny coverage for pre-existing conditions, mental health services, and any other benefits they consider too costly.

body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fde79/2a380d31/2e2871c/fe1ee2/3012877684/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fde79/2a380d31/2e2871c/fe1ee2/3012877684/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
We need to talk about birth control, everyone.
Millions of women use it to prevent pregnancy, but doctors also prescribe it to treat health issues like acne, bone thinning, ovarian cysts, endometrial and ovarian cancers, premenstrual syndrome, anemia, and infections in the fallopian tubes, ovaries and uterus.
And that's just to name a few.
**Despite the world of good birth control does for women, the Trump administration just announced new rules that allow employers to opt out of providing insurance coverage for it.**
Senator Hassan and other Senate Democrats are pushing back against this attack on women, but they need to know you're with them:
[**Add your voice to our petition to oppose Trump 's new, draconian rule that limits access to birth control and women's health care.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fde79/2a380d31/2e2871c/fe1ee3/3012877684/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/womensrights/?code=hassan&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2F2017_birth-control%3Frefcode%3D20171012_birthcontrolJA_up")
President Obama made access to birth control and affordable health care a cornerstone of his presidency, and for good reason. Nine in ten women of reproductive age will use contraception at some point in their lives, so it's no surprise that because of Obamacare, women have saved $1.4 BILLION on birth control costs.
Now, Trump is undermining that legacy and more importantly, the coverage that millions of women depend on. It's up to us to protect it.
[**Please put your name down now to demand that we keep birth control affordable for all women.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fde79/2a380d31/2e2871c/fe1ee3/3012877684/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/womensrights/?code=hassan&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2F2017_birth-control%3Frefcode%3D20171012_birthcontrolJA_up")

name: Andrew Gillum
subject: Thermostat or thermometer?
body:
#
Team --
There is a reason why the issue of race remains the third rail of politics -- never to be touched, other than to ceremoniously say that we should "have a conversation about race."
During a stop at a college campus last week in Tampa, I was asked by a student about my assessment of the state of race and what we can do to address racism in society.
I spoke openly about the fact that I see the role that race plays in society on a regular basis. Without going into the facts about health disparities, economic disparities, disparities in the criminal justice system and in sentencing, I instead talked personally about how I experience race -- as a father of three black children, as a husband to a black wife, as a son to two black parents, as a proud alumnus of an HBCU, and as an elected official.
I shared with the students that nearly everyday on my drive I see a Confederate flag on the back of a vehicle. In seeing these symbols I expressed that I frequently have to psych myself out to avoid letting things like that get to me. In calling for the Confederate monument at the Old State Capitol grounds to be removed I discussed the impact that the vestiges of slavery can have on the next generation and why I feel strongly that we should act to ensure that our children aren't fighting these same battles in the future.
But it isn't about the Confederate flag. I promise it never has been, and never will be.
No -- the debate over Confederate symbols pales in comparison to folks who lose their life, their jobs, or their freedoms due to the role that racism plays in our society. These are real injustices that affect us on a daily basis -- not a statue on state property.
But instead of focusing on the REAL point of our need to address race and racism in a more serious and intentional way, some have decided to parse my words, question whether I actually see Confederate flags on cars, and claim that I am attacking my own hometown.
Let me be clear: I love Tallahassee.
It's where I'm raising my family, and it's the place that gave me a chance to serve at the young age of 23. I would not choose another place to call home, and I share the beauty of my experience in Tallahassee every place that I visit. I talk about how my community has leaned into our challenges with courageous conversations and events like the Longest Table, Tallahassee Forward, the Village Square and more.
That said, like every community, we have our own issues related to race and racism that we have to continue to confront. You can love a place and at the same time work to make it better. My record is clear on how I have done just that.
My pastor talks about it in the terms of being the thermostat versus the thermometer. There are enough people who are prepared to take the temperature. There are not enough people who are willing to set it. We need to change that.
I believe we are at a time in our state and our nation's history that requires not just people who quietly agree on these critical issues we are facing, but people who are going to be champions, who will get out and lead in these tough conversations.
That's why I'm challenging you to take two actions today:
1. [**Join us in this historic campaign for Florida Governor so that we can start to confront these critical issues in the Florida Capitol.**](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb329d/9e00690/4f8642c5/240315da/2347930756/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-oct2017-vol?refcode=em171012-rr")
2. Do your best to have at least one of these difficult conversations with someone in your life this week. Approach them with respect, listen to them thoughtfully, and respond with as much compassion and understanding as possible.

I'm excited to see what we can accomplish together. Thank you for everything.
Bring it home,
Andrew
**[CONTRIBUTE](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb329d/9e00690/4f8642c5/240315da/2347930756/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-oct2017-vol?refcode=em171012-rr")**

Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb329d/9e00690/4f8642c5/240315dd/2347930756/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip="). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb329d/9e00690/4f8642c5/240315dc/2347930756/VEsC/ "https://gillum.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/"). [You can support our campaign by making a donation.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb329d/9e00690/4f8642c5/240315df/2347930756/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-footer")

body:
Do you approve of President Trump's executive order to undercut the ACA? |
---

| | | Peter,

This morning, after trying -- and failing -- three times to dismantle the Affordable Care Act, President Trump decided to act on his own accord. He signed an executive order that allows employers to provide less coverage to their employees and jacks up the cost for folks seeking coverage under the ACA -- particularly seniors and those living with pre-existing conditions.

This is nothing more than a deliberate attempt to sabotage the Affordable Care Act. But I want to know what you think.

**Do you approve of President Trump 's executive order to undercut the ACA?**
